changelog: v1.5.31: Hardware scan timeout fix — loading screen never hangs
changes: FIX: _get_gpus() shutdown(wait=False) — nvidia-smi hang no longer blocks startup
FIX: Startup hardware scan capped at 3s — partial data shown rather than hanging
FIX: Frontend loading screen hard cap at 3s — never stuck on SCANNING HARDWARE
FIX: /api/forge/benchmark/baseline returns 200 with no_data status instead of 404
